title: Wooden Play Kitchen Set for Kids – Interactive Pretend Toddler Kitchen Playset with 12 Kitchen Toy Accessories, Perfect for Ages 3+
features: Interactive Play Kitchen for Toddlers & Kids: This wooden play kitchen set includes essential features like a realistic faucet, oven and ice maker. Perfect for kids aged 3+, it encourages imaginative role play that develops sensory and motor skills

Realistic Cooking and Play Experience: Equipped with a gas stove that produces cooking sounds and an ice maker that dispenses pretend ice cubes, this kids' play kitchen simulates real-life culinary activities, enhancing creative play and storytelling

Safe, High-Quality Materials: Crafted from high-quality wood with a smooth finish, this toddler kitchen playset ensures safe, long-lasting use. Certified to meet strict child safety standards, it provides parents peace of mind during playtime

Modern, Kid-Friendly Design: The sleek, contemporary look of this kids kitchen playset fits seamlessly into any playroom or home space. With its eye-catching design and engaging features, it’s more than just a toy—it’s a source of endless imaginative fun

Educational & Developmental Benefits: Inspired by Montessori play, this toddler play kitchen encourages hands-on learning, helping children build cognitive, language, and fine motor skills while enjoying pretend play and social interactions
